$description: Base parameters. These are the only values a designer edits to retheme the system. Everything in semantic.tokens.json is a formula derived from these.

hue.$description: Brand hue (0–360). Single change repaints all tinted surfaces and borders.

chroma.$description: Surface chroma. Low (0.01–0.02) = subtle tint. High = saturated surfaces.

hue-accent.$description: Accent hue. Default: gold (85). Try base.hue + 180 for complementary.

chroma-accent.$description: Accent chroma. Controls saturation of interactive elements.

chroma-status.$description: Shared chroma for all status colors (success/warning/danger/info).

font-size.$description: Base font size in px. Changing this scales the entire type system.

scale-ratio.$description: Typographic modular scale ratio. 1.25 = major third. 1.333 = perfect fourth.

space-unit.$description: Base spacing atom in px. All spacings are integer multiples. Hard grid.

density-factor.$description: Active density multiplier. Resolver generates mode overrides from density-compact / density-spacious.

motion-base.$description: Base motion duration in ms. All durations are multiples of this.
